rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' most naturally targets prose quality — sentence clarity, concision, word choice, and paragraph flow — making writing polish the primary load-bearing responsibility for this delegation.

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' mean prose and style polish only, or should I also identify and resolve technical inconsistencies (e.g., the apparent tension between the stated black-box, linearization-free approach and the Lyapunov function explicitly constructed from the state cost matrix Q)?
